SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Dec-08-2010 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: 12:13pm
Judge Pro Tem Elliott Myles, clerk - Leslie Gomez, nothing on record, dept. 414.
Cause called for Small Claims Appeal. Appellant, Rosa Herrera appears in pro per with Ms. Yee. Respondent, Timothy Bradford Smith appears in pro per.
Parties, previously sworn, testify in the narrative and respond to questions from Judge Myles.
